name: Look or Die
short_description: What happened at this school back then? A mystery horror story unfolds in an abandoned school.
detailed_description:
A First-Person Mystery Horror Set in an Abandoned School

Can you uncover the truth behind the incident as you explore?

Story

There’s something lurking in the school at night...

The protagonist, a newly hired teacher, is about to head home after a long day when they stumble upon an old talisman. The moment they remove it, the school transforms into an abandoned ruin, and a strange, time-frozen world envelops them.

This forsaken school hides terrifying secrets from the past, with restless spirits wandering its halls, guarding those secrets.

The protagonist must confront their fears and uncover the dark truth of what really happened here.

The Ghosts Think They're Just Playing...

As you explore, you’ll encounter various paranormal phenomena. Uncover the cause of each and find a way to deal with them.

Multiple Endings

Three different endings await.

Play time 1-3 hours

Streaming Guidelines

- Streaming is allowed without any prior permission, whether by individuals or organizations.

- It would be appreciated if you could include a link to the Steam page in your video description.

- We are not responsible for any damages that may result from streaming this game.
